title: SpaceX COO Shotwell says Tesla tie-up ‘might make Elon’s life a little easier’
summary_full: As SpaceX prepared to hit the Nasdaq following its record IPO, Elon Musk's second-in-command didn't dismiss the possibility of a Tesla tie-up.
summary_public: As SpaceX prepared to hit the Nasdaq following its record IPO, Elon Musk's second-in-command didn't dismiss the possibility of a Tesla tie-up.
